feed.title: The Solo Salon
feed.subtitle: A blog focusing on AWS, cybersecurity, and potentially any other domain of knowledge.

entry.title: Muscular Failure as Communion
entry.summary: Muscular Failure as Communion In this post, I intend to portray an option for framing exercise that I believe is optimal and rarely utilized. Before doing so, as the framing relies on some rather esoteric and personal jargon, I will need to define some terms, and lay the groundwork for the perspective that is necessary to utilize this frame of mind. So bare with me if this seems completely unr...
